---
title: "compiler.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\compiler.ts"
loc: 68
complexity: 7
logic_score: 4.25
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 9.06
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `compiler.ts` module implements the 'Matrix Compiler' for Operation PennyOne. It aggregates the analysis results from all sectors and synthesizes them into a unified `matrix-graph.json` file, resolving internal dependencies to create a complete neural map of the repository.

## Interaction Protocol
Call the `compileMatrix` function with an array of `FileData` objects. It returns the file path to the newly compiled global graph, which is then used by the 3D visualization and the Warden.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 26 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../types.ts)
- [GungnirMatrix](file://../types.ts)
- [CompiledGraph](file://../types.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `compileMatrix`
- `compileMatrix`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `knownPaths`
- `resolveDependency`
- `absolute`
- `normalizedImport`
- `candidates`
- `extensions`
- `p`
- `indexFile`
- `payload`
